title: Scriveiner Black Lacquer Ballpoint - Stunning Luxury Pen, Real Gold Plating, Schmidt Black Refill, Best Ball Pen Gift Set for Men & Women, Professional Executive Office, Nice Fancy Designer Pens
features: Enjoy the feel of a true luxury pen in your hand – Stunning luxury ballpoint pen by Scriveiner. Brass with jet-black lacquer finished in real gold plating. Premium quality and understated luxury from a boutique British brand.
Transcribe your thoughts effortlessly – Perfectly weighted and balanced, the Schmidt refill from Germany glides smoothly across any type of paper. A luxury pen for those who love to write every day.
Impress your colleagues and your love ones – Whether as a casual or executive pen, for work, office or personal use, your Scriveiner ballpoint will be admired by those around you.
Express elegance, sophistication and understated luxury – Scriveiner pens are designed in London, England and share the timeless attributes of classic British design.
Buy with total confidence – We know the quality of our products and we want you to have the best possible.
description: Product Description Winner of the Kings Award by His Majesty King Charles III (2023) Scriveiner Collection Classic Fountain Pen Range Our beautifully crafted fountain pens, made with German Shmidt nibs are the epitome of luxury pens. For those who are looking for that special unique experience that can only happen with a traditional fountain pen. EDC Pen Range For a luxurious everyday carry pen, available in both fountain pen and rollerball, the Scriveiner EDC pens are the epitome of understated sophistication. Designed to fit in your pocket and also be a full size pen with the lid posted. This versatile and perfectly weighted range of pens give a superb writing experience. Classic Rollerball Range Savour the convenience of a ballpoint with the luxurious feel of a fountain pen with our liquid ink Rollerball pens. Ballpoint Pen Range For those moments when smooth precision is key, the Scriveiner Ballpoint is an excellent choice. Experience a thrill of pleasure as you enjoy the beauty, quality and understated luxury that a Scriveiner pen delivers with every stroke across the page.
